improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your operations. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Meet Gideon, Your Business & Trade Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace for business owners, traders, and professionals. Start with three free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.jpg"><meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating Gideon's core value proposition. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter—critical for B2B audiences. The copy highlights the free trial offer to encourage clicks without overpromising.

improvements.suggestion:
Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant

Meet Gideon — instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for business owners and traders. Try three free searches, no credit card required.
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately communicates what Gideon is (AI assistant) and who it serves (trade and business professionals). The subheading reinforces three key value props from the site context while lowering friction with the free trial mention. Direct, benefit-driven copy builds trust and drives action.

improvements.suggestion:
**Q: What happens after my three free searches?**

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be prompted to select a membership plan to continue. Choose from US$2 or US$7 per day, billed monthly or annually—with annual plans saving you 30 percent. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited access to Gideon's AI-powered trade and business support, voice chat, and your own dedicated workspace.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the trial-to-paid conversion moment, reducing friction and uncertainty. It transparently explains the paywall visitors will encounter, reinforces the value they'll receive as members, and highlights the annual savings—all of which build trust and encourage conversion.
